events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need parse scenario. It describes crew used field method for Equipment safety less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Need evaluate described field condition. Since no specific hazard described, method is compliant with instructions and project requirements, no prohibition. Decision should be pass. Risk low. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions none flagged -> empty list. Percent complete maybe 50? Value 0. Sound_source etc default. Findings maybe none. Actions none needed. Rationale: field method conforms to manufacturer instructions and project requirements; OSHA 1926 Subpart O requires equipment safety per manufacturer instructions and competent person; no violation. References OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Need ensure JSON valid.
